scripts.typecheck: node --input-type=module --eval "import { readdir } from 'node:fs/promises'; import { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'; const entries = await readdir(new URL('./src', import.meta.url), { recursive: true, withFileTypes: true }).catch(() => []); if (entries.some((entry) => entry.isFile() && entry.name.endsWith('.ts'))) execFileSync('pnpm', ['exec', 'tsc', '--project', 'tsconfig.json', '--noEmit'], { stdio: 'inherit' });"
